title: Apply Pack — Application Coach
description: Apply pack generator: cover letter, form answers, LinkedIn note, talking points. Text only — no auto-submit.

userStories.title: Apply pack backend generator
userStories.description: POST /api/applications/{id}/apply-pack via OpenRouter. Cache on application.apply_pack.

userStories.title: ApplyPackSection in detail panel
userStories.description: AiSection with Generate CTA, copy buttons per field.

userStories.title: Autopilot approve includes apply pack hints
userStories.description: Pending card or post-approve shows talking points from prep.
acceptanceCriteria: Talking points on pending or approve flow

userStories.title: Extension apply hints stub
userStories.description: Popup read-only talking points from last save. No auto-fill.
